title: Reap IR helpers subsumed by the entity-coordinate walk
summary: A new entity-coordinate walk (`elementCoordinates(storage)`) made several older asymmetry-driven IR helpers redundant. Reap the cleanly-removable ones so the coordinate walk is canonical, while deferring the surfaces with structural prerequisites (fixture/hash churn, query-builder rewrite). Drawn from real history: TML-2727 / PRs #630, #631, #629 — three parallel, disjoint slices.
